subject: Helping Torres Family Barber Shop Grow Online

notes: Business reported CLOSED on Yelp as of March 2026

subject: Helping Monalessa's Kitchen Grow Online
body:
Hi Shahidul,

I came across Monalessa's Kitchen and really like what you're doing in Fall River. As a fellow Massachusetts business owner, I know how important it is to have a strong online presence — and I think there's a great opportunity for Monalessa's Kitchen to reach even more customers.

My name is Isaiah Wright, and I run One Vision Marketing out of Bridgewater, MA. We're a full-service digital marketing agency that helps small businesses like yours grow through:

- Professional website creation & hosting
- Google, Facebook & Instagram advertising
- SEO to help customers find you online
- Strategies to bring in more clients and boost revenue
- Social media management & brand development

We've worked with businesses across Massachusetts, and I also have marketing research experience with RECNA here in Bridgewater, helping them expand their reach and grow.

I actually already put together a sample website for Monalessa's Kitchen so you can see what's possible:
https://pradazay1-code.github.io/marketing-Sauce/clients/leads/websites/monalessas-kitchen/

This is just a starting point — if you're interested, I'd customize it with your real photos, menu, and branding. No pressure at all, just wanted to show you what we can do.

Would you be open to a quick chat this week?

Best regards,
Isaiah Wright
One Vision Marketing
Bridgewater, MA
